name: Professional Sports Related Industries
description: Assessment of involvement in professional sports including sports federations, competitions, clubs, agencies, broadcasting, and marketing. Special income threshold of 25 million CHF applies for sports organizations and clubs.
field: professional sports, sports clubs, sports organizations, sports agents, athlete representation, player transfers, sports management, sports marketing

involvement.text: Is the client involved through his activity: {activity} in sports, sport events, sport personalities, sports broadcasting, sports marketing, sports federations/organizations, or sport agents/agencies?
involvement.summary: Sports Involvement Verification - Is the client involved in sports-related activities?

professional_sports_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client involved in professional sports through a professional sports organization, club, or league rather than amateur sports? Answer Yes when the activity concerns a professional sports club, league, or organization even if the client is an owner, executive board member, or senior executive rather than an athlete.
professional_sports_check.summary: Professional Sports Verification - Is the activity tied to a professional sports organization, club, or league?

excluded_activity_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client's role clearly limited to an out-of-scope professional-sports relationship such as being an athlete themself, an amateur-sports participant, a sponsor, an external event-support or general service provider, a marketing-through-sports business, or a non-senior employee without ownership, board authority, or executive power in an in-scope sports organization, club, federation, or agency?
excluded_activity_check.summary: Excluded Activity Check - Is the sports-related activity explicitly out of scope?

isf_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client directly involved in an International Sports Federation (ISF), the International Olympic Committee (IOC), or a similar international sports governing body, including as an executive board member, senior decision-maker, or other policy-relevant role within the governing body itself? If the client is a Legal Entity, answer Yes if the entity itself is the International Sports Federation, IOC, or similar international sports governing body described in the activity or client notes.
isf_check.summary: International Sports Federation (ISF) / IOC Check - Is the activity directly tied to an in-scope international sports governing body?

isf_controlled_entity_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client involved in a legal entity that is owned 50% or more, or otherwise materially controlled, by an International Sports Federation (ISF), the International Olympic Committee (IOC), or a similar international sports governing body? If the client is a Legal Entity, answer Yes if the client entity itself is the ISF-controlled, IOC-controlled, or similar governing-body-controlled entity described in the activity or client notes.
isf_controlled_entity_check.summary: International Sports Federation (ISF) / IOC-Controlled Entity Check - Is the activity tied to an in-scope governing-body-controlled entity?

organization_check.text: Through their activity: {activity} is the client involved in professional sport organizations and clubs ?
organization_check.summary: Organization or Club Verification - Is the activity a professional sports organization or club?

agency_scope_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client involved in a sports agent or sports agency business that is directly engaged in athlete representation, player transfers, sports marketing of professional sports personalities or events, or the purchase or sale of rights including broadcasting rights related to professional sports? If the client is a Legal Entity, answer Yes if the entity itself carries on that in-scope agency or rights business.
agency_scope_check.summary: Agency Scope Check - Is the activity an in-scope sports agent or agency role?

income_check_2.text: Based on the client activity: {activity}, do the client notes establish that the relevant professional sports organization, league, or club falls within the high-revenue category of annual revenue, gross revenue, or annual turnover of at least CHF 25 million (or the equivalent in another currency)? Answer Yes if the notes either state the amount directly or clearly classify the relevant organization, league, or club as falling within the CHF 25 million-or-more category. Do not require a separate standalone revenue sentence if the client notes already state that the relevant organization or club belongs to that high-revenue category.
income_check_2.summary: 25 Million Revenue Check - High-value sports organization threshold

isf_entity_self_check.text: If the client is a Legal Entity, is the client entity itself the in-scope International Sports Federation (ISF), IOC or similar international sports governing body, or the ISF-controlled or IOC-controlled entity described in the activity or client notes? Answer Yes only when the entity itself is that governing body or controlled entity. If the client is a Natural Person, answer No.

isf_role_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client a senior executive, executive board member, or other policy-relevant senior decision-maker in the International Sports Federation (ISF), IOC, similar governing body, or the ISF-controlled or IOC-controlled entity? Roles such as Secretary General, Deputy Secretary General, CEO, CFO, COO, Managing Director, Executive Board Member, Vice-President, Chair, or similar senior leadership roles should be treated as Yes unless the notes clearly show the role was honorary, non-executive, or purely advisory. If the client is a Legal Entity, answer No unless the notes clearly identify a specific individual's role rather than the entity itself.

isf_ownership_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client an owner or shareholder of the relevant ISF-controlled or IOC-controlled entity?

isf_ownership_threshold_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client's ownership share in the relevant ISF-controlled or IOC-controlled entity higher than 25%? If the client data only states that the client is the owner, answer Yes. If the ownership share is not stated, answer Missing Information.

club_entity_self_check.text: If the client is a Legal Entity, is the client entity itself the high-revenue professional sports organization, club, or league described in the activity or client notes? Answer Yes only when the entity itself operates that professional sports organization, club, or league. If the client is a Natural Person, answer No.

club_role_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client part of the senior executive management or an executive board member of the relevant professional sports organization, club, or league? Roles such as CEO, CFO, COO, Managing Director, Secretary General, President, Executive Chair, Executive Vice-President, or Executive Board Member should be treated as Yes unless the notes clearly show the role was honorary, non-executive, purely supervisory, or purely advisory. If the client is a Legal Entity, answer No unless the notes clearly identify a specific individual's role rather than the entity itself.

club_ownership_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client the owner or a shareholder of the relevant professional sports organization, club, or league?

club_ownership_threshold_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client's ownership share in the relevant professional sports organization, club, or league higher than 25%? If the client data only states that the client is the owner, answer Yes. If the ownership share is not stated, answer Missing Information.

agency_entity_self_check.text: If the client is a Legal Entity, is the client entity itself the directly engaged sports agent, sports agency, or sports-rights business described in the activity or client notes? Answer Yes only when the entity itself carries on that in-scope agency or rights business. If the client is a Natural Person, answer No.

agency_role_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client a senior executive, executive board member, or other senior decision-maker with executive authority in the directly engaged sports agent, sports agency, or sports-rights business? Roles such as CEO, CFO, COO, Managing Director, Executive Board Member, Chair, or similar senior leadership roles should be treated as Yes unless the notes clearly show the role was honorary, non-executive, or purely advisory. If the client is a Legal Entity, answer No unless the notes clearly identify a specific individual's role rather than the entity itself.

agency_ownership_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client the owner or a shareholder in the directly engaged sports agent, sports agency, or sports-rights business?

agency_ownership_threshold_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client's ownership share in the directly engaged sports agent, sports agency, or sports-rights business higher than 25%? If the client data only states that the client is the owner, answer Yes. If the ownership share is not stated, answer Missing Information.

passive_minority_agency_investor_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client's sports-agency or sports-marketing connection clearly limited to a passive minority ownership interest below 25%, without a board seat, executive authority, signing authority, day-to-day management role, or direct engagement in athlete representation, player transfers, sponsorship-rights deals, or broadcasting-rights transactions?

prompts: Is/was the client earning more than 25% of his total yearly income/revenue from the following activity? : {activity}
Is/was the client's activity '{activity}' contributing to more than 25% of his total wealth?
direct_engagement_4.comment: last resort to potentially catch some figures we are not catching at the moment

final_status_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, is the client's qualifying professional-sports SIAP involvement clearly past-only, meaning the qualifying ownership, executive role, or other qualifying sports-related involvement ended in the past and there is no current qualifying sports-related involvement?

cooled_down_check.text: Based on the activity: {activity}, does the client satisfy the professional-sports cooldown rule because the qualifying sports-related involvement has stopped and either (a) at least 12 months have elapsed, sports-linked wealth has remained below 25% on a sustained basis, and near-term re-entry is not expected, or (b) at least 24 months have elapsed and near-term re-entry is not expected regardless of wealth share?
